character_dossiers.name: Long John Silver
character_dossiers.biography: A crew member engaged in a covert conversation with another crew member, discussing a plan involving gold and potential betrayal.

character_dossiers.name: Tom
character_dossiers.biography: A crew member involved in a confrontation with Long John Silver, displaying defiance and loyalty to duty.

character_dossiers.name: Alan
character_dossiers.biography: A crew member killed by Long John Silver, referenced in a conversation between Silver and Tom.
